description: A FastAPI REST API for managing todo items with SQLite persistence and basic auth

tasks.title: Project scaffolding
tasks.description: Create pyproject.toml with fastapi, uvicorn, pydantic, pytest as dependencies. Create app/ directory with __init__.py. Create a main.py that starts FastAPI app.
tasks.notes: Use SQLite, no external DB needed.

tasks.title: Todo data model
tasks.description: Create app/models.py with a Pydantic model for Todo items: id (int), title (str), completed (bool, default False), created_at (datetime).
tasks.test_command: python3 -c "from app.models import TodoCreate, TodoResponse; t = TodoCreate(title='test'); print(t.title)"

tasks.title: SQLite database layer
tasks.description: Create app/database.py with functions: init_db(), get_all_todos(), get_todo(id), create_todo(todo), update_todo(id, todo), delete_todo(id). Use sqlite3 directly (no ORM).
tasks.test_command: python3 -c "from app.database import init_db; init_db(); print('DB initialized')"

tasks.title: CRUD API endpoints
tasks.description: Add endpoints to app/main.py: GET /todos, GET /todos/{id}, POST /todos, PUT /todos/{id}, DELETE /todos/{id}. Call init_db() on startup.
tasks.test_command: python3 -c "from app.main import app; from fastapi.testclient import TestClient; c=TestClient(app); r=c.get('/todos'); assert r.status_code==200; print('OK')"

tasks.title: Input validation
tasks.description: Add validation: title must be 1-200 chars, reject empty titles, return 422 for invalid input with clear error messages.
tasks.test_command: python3 -c "from app.main import app; from fastapi.testclient import TestClient; c=TestClient(app); r=c.post('/todos',json={'title':''}); assert r.status_code==422; print('OK')"

tasks.title: Error handling for missing resources
tasks.description: Return 404 with {'detail': 'Todo not found'} when GET/PUT/DELETE a non-existent todo ID.
tasks.test_command: python3 -c "from app.main import app; from fastapi.testclient import TestClient; c=TestClient(app); r=c.get('/todos/99999'); assert r.status_code==404; print('OK')"

tasks.title: Unit tests for database layer
tasks.description: Create tests/test_database.py with pytest tests for all database functions. Use a temporary DB file for isolation.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover create, read, update, delete
tasks.notes: Use tmp_path fixture for DB isolation.

tasks.title: Integration tests for API endpoints
tasks.description: Create tests/test_api.py with pytest tests using FastAPI's TestClient. Test all CRUD endpoints, validation, and error handling.

tasks.title: Health check endpoint
tasks.description: Add GET /health that returns {'status': 'healthy', 'todos_count': N} where N is the number of todos in the database.
acceptance_criteria: Response has status and todos_count fields
tasks.test_command: python3 -c "from app.main import app; from fastapi.testclient import TestClient; c=TestClient(app); r=c.get('/health'); assert r.status_code==200; assert 'status' in r.json(); print('OK')"

tasks.title: Full test suite passes
tasks.description: Run the entire test suite. Fix any broken tests. Ensure all tests pass. Add a test for the health endpoint.
